instructions: ; NATIVE COMPILATION LOOP FOR INTENT: VoidMesh
vsetvli t0, x0, e64, m8, ta, ma   ; Configure vector unit for VLEN=2048 (e64, m8 grouping)
; State Disconnected (ID: 0)
;   on connect_nic -> NodeHandshake
vfmv.v.f v5, 38224.8000    ; Load total energy cost (with 6.18% fee) into v5
vfsub.vv v1, v1, v5         ; Deduct energy cost from wide register v1 (mesh_energy)
li t1, 1                  ; Load target state ID 1
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
; State NodeHandshake (ID: 1)
;   on peer_challenge_verify -> SlidingWindowSyncing
vfmv.v.f v5, 57337.2000    ; Load total energy cost (with 6.18% fee) into v5
vfsub.vv v1, v1, v5         ; Deduct energy cost from wide register v1 (mesh_energy)
li t1, 2                  ; Load target state ID 2
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
;   on peer_challenge_verify -> RejectNode
li t1, 9                  ; Load target state ID 9
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
; State SlidingWindowSyncing (ID: 2)
;   on sliding_window_lock -> Connected
vfmv.v.f v5, 19112.4000    ; Load total energy cost (with 6.18% fee) into v5
vfsub.vv v1, v1, v5         ; Deduct energy cost from wide register v1 (mesh_energy)
li t1, 3                  ; Load target state ID 3
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
; State Connected (ID: 3)
;   on send_frame -> FrameSent
vfmv.v.f v5, 3822.4800    ; Load total energy cost (with 6.18% fee) into v5
vfsub.vv v1, v1, v5         ; Deduct energy cost from wide register v1 (mesh_energy)
li t1, 4                  ; Load target state ID 4
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
;   on receive_ack -> Connected
vfmv.v.f v5, 1911.2400    ; Load total energy cost (with 6.18% fee) into v5
vfsub.vv v1, v1, v5         ; Deduct energy cost from wide register v1 (mesh_energy)
li t1, 3                  ; Load target state ID 3
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
;   on receive_ack -> ReTransmitFrame
vfmv.v.f v5, 7644.9600    ; Load total energy cost (with 6.18% fee) into v5
vfsub.vv v1, v1, v5         ; Deduct energy cost from wide register v1 (mesh_energy)
li t1, 5                  ; Load target state ID 5
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
;   on frame_timeout -> ReTransmitFrame
vfmv.v.f v5, 11467.4400    ; Load total energy cost (with 6.18% fee) into v5
vfsub.vv v1, v1, v5         ; Deduct energy cost from wide register v1 (mesh_energy)
li t1, 5                  ; Load target state ID 5
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
;   on dispatch_weight_slice -> DistributingWeights
vfmv.v.f v5, 57337.2000    ; Load total energy cost (with 6.18% fee) into v5
vfsub.vv v1, v1, v5         ; Deduct energy cost from wide register v1 (mesh_energy)
li t1, 6                  ; Load target state ID 6
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
;   on verify_consensus_pass -> VerifyingConsensus
vfmv.v.f v5, 76449.6000    ; Load total energy cost (with 6.18% fee) into v5
vfsub.vv v1, v1, v5         ; Deduct energy cost from wide register v1 (mesh_energy)
li t1, 7                  ; Load target state ID 7
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
;   on disconnect -> Disconnected
li t1, 0                  ; Load target state ID 0
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
; State FrameSent (ID: 4)
;   on wait_ack -> Connected
li t1, 3                  ; Load target state ID 3
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
; State ReTransmitFrame (ID: 5)
;   on retransmit_complete -> Connected
li t1, 3                  ; Load target state ID 3
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
; State DistributingWeights (ID: 6)
;   on distribution_success -> Connected
li t1, 3                  ; Load target state ID 3
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
;   on distribution_timeout -> Connected
li t1, 3                  ; Load target state ID 3
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
; State VerifyingConsensus (ID: 7)
;   on consensus_match -> Connected
li t1, 3                  ; Load target state ID 3
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
;   on consensus_mismatch -> AuditTrigger
li t1, 8                  ; Load target state ID 8
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
; State AuditTrigger (ID: 8)
;   on flag_malicious_node -> Connected
vfmv.v.f v5, 191124.0000    ; Load total energy cost (with 6.18% fee) into v5
vfsub.vv v1, v1, v5         ; Deduct energy cost from wide register v1 (mesh_energy)
li t1, 3                  ; Load target state ID 3
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
; State RejectNode (ID: 9)
;   on disconnect_peer -> Disconnected
li t1, 0                  ; Load target state ID 0
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
